# Internal Fixture Skills Portfolio Auditor Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Audit multiple local skills together.
- Summarize portfolio-level maintenance decisions.

## Workflow

1. Review the whole skill set conservatively.
2. Return a skill-audit report with portfolio-level actions.
